name: @knowledge-os/graph-explorer
description: Read-only Sigma.js v3 shell for ACL-safe Knowledge OS graphs

scripts.test: npm run clean && npm run build && node --test dist/test/*.test.js
scripts.performance:fixtures: npm run clean && npm run build && node dist/perf/scale.js
scripts.acceptance:scan: npm run clean && npm run build && node dist/acceptance/phase-b.js
